title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Cycle cell anemia is an inherited blood disease that affects your red blood cells.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: In this disease, an abnormal protein molecule called hemoglobin S changes your disc-shaped

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: flexible red blood cells into rigid, sickle-shaped cells.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Cycle cells can block blood flow and can cause pain and tissue damage.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: And sickle cells don't last as long as normal red blood cells.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: As a result, your blood has less red blood cells than normal.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: This condition is called anemia.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Treatment options for sickle cell anemia may include medicines or procedures to help

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: relieve symptoms, or in certain cases a hematopoid-extem cell transplant to potentially cure the disease.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Antibiotics and vaccine shots for diseases can help prevent infections.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Your healthcare provider may advise you to take pain relievers for severe or chronic pain.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: One of the most common medicines for long-term treatment of sickle cell anemia is called

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: hydroxyuria.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: It helps reduce pain by preventing damage to your red blood cells.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: It also reduces the risk of long-term complications.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Other prescribed medicines that help prevent complications and improve long-term outcomes include

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: chrysanlysmab, buxelator, and elglutamine.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: If you have an episode of very severe pain, you may have a procedure called a blood transfusion.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: This replaces the sickle cells with healthy red blood cells.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: For young patients who have, or are at risk for complications from sickle-cell anemia, a

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: hematopoid-extem cell transplant may be advised.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: It can cure some people who have this disease.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: For the transplant, you may be given chemotherapy drugs, radiation therapy, or both.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: This will destroy the abnormal blood-forming stem cells in your bone marrow.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: Then, you will receive healthy stem cells from either the bone marrow or blood of a donor.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: The donor is often a family member whose tissue type closely matches yours.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: The healthy blood-forming stem cells from the donor will travel through your blood to

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: your bone marrow, where they will make normal red blood cells instead of sickle cells.

title: ANH22256 Treatment for Sickle Cell Anemia
text_en: To find out more about treatments for sickle-cell anemia, talk to your healthcare provider.
